sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84731" key="polugrafe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-γρᾰφέω</orth>, <sense id="n84731.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">write much</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at length,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:4:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.9</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0660.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollon.Cit.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
